sections.sectionTitle: Minam Dangte leh Edomte tungah Topa' Thangpaihna

verses.text: Minam khempeuhte aw, thu za dingin hong pai un. Mihingte aw, hong ngai un! Leitang leh a tungah a om khempeuhte aw, ngai un. Leitung buppi leh a tung panin a hong pai mi khempeuh in ngai un
Bang hang hiam cih leh minam khempeuh tungah Topa lunghamin, amaute khempeuh tungah heh mahmah a, a simang dingin amaute koihin, thah dingin a pia khinta hi
A kithat amau' mite kilawnkhia ding a, a siluang hawmte uih semsem ding hi. Amau' sisan in mual khempeuh sansak ding hi
Vantunga a om khempeuh muatmang ding a, laidal bangin vantungte kizial ding hi. Leenggui panin a tehte pulhin, theikung panin a tehte a pulh bangin aksi hon khempeuh pulh ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka namsau in vantungah a sep ding khempeuh a zawh khit ciangin, en un, a siamang dinga ka sehsa Edom mite tungah thu a khen dingin hong kumsuk ding hi

Topa in namsau khat nei hi. Sisan tawh kidim ding a, biakpiakna tuuno si leh keel si, tuutalte' kal thau tawh a kizolsak bang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Bozrah khua-ah hih biakpiakna nei ding a, Edom gamah hih bang tampi thahna omsak ding hi
Gamsial talte amaute tawh tukkhawm ding a, bawngtalno gehsate leh bawngtal hatte tukkhawm ding hi. Amau' gam pen sisan tawh kidiah ding a, amau' leitang pen sathau in nipsak ding hi
Topa in Zion a hotkhiat ding, a galte a thuksak ding hun khat a nei hi
Luitui khempeuh kultaltui suak ding a, leitang pen kaat suak ding hi. Gamsung khempeuh pen a kuang kultaltui a suak ding hi
Sun leh zanin mitlo ding a, vantung lamah a khu kahto ngitnget ding hi. Khang khat pan khang khat, a hawmguakin om ding a, kuamah in nawk ngei nawn hetlo ding hi
Ahih hangin mu leh sakuh in gamsung teng luah ding uh a, keising leh va-akte om ding uh hi. Amah in a khaukhai khai sukin a khaukhai sikbawk a khia ding hi
Kumpi Omlo Gam, ci-in amaute in min phuak ding uh a, a ulian khempeuhte a mawkna hi ding uh hi
Kumpi inn liante sungah lingkung po ding a, kulh a nei khuasungah laho leh thangling kungte a po ding hi. Ngiate' an zon'na mun suakin, vasa-kalaohte' omna mun hi ding hi
Sangak leh ngiate kikhawl ding uh a, keeldawi in a lawmte sam ding hi. Dawi zong hong tuaksukin ama omna ding mun a zong ding hi
Tua munah keising in bu tomin, tua lai-ah tui-in keuh ding a, ama liimah a note huai ding hi. Musite zong kikhawm tuahin a nupa ciatun om ding uh hi

Topa' laibu sung panin zong un la hih thu sim un. Hih ganhingte khempeuh khat beek zong mangthanglo ding a, lawm sam khat zong omlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu pia khinzo a, amahmah in amaute kaikhawm ding hi
Amah in amaute-a' dingin leitang hawmsak ding a, amau' tanh ding ciat a pia ding hi. Amaute in tua gam nei tawntung ding uh a, khang khat pan khang khat dongin teng paisuak ding uh hi.
